CONTENT.Career: After almost ten year in the club's youth ranks, on 1 April 2014, Hüsing signed a professional contract with Bundesliga club Werder Bremen until 2017. During the following Bundesliga season, he managed to earn a spot for the first team's squad in four Bundesliga matches, coming in from the bench even twice. In January 2015, he was loaned to 3. Liga side Hansa Rostock for the remainder of the season.After twelve years with Werder Bremen, Hüsing signed for Ferencváros in June 2016. The reported transfer fee was €300,000.In July 2017, Hüsing returned to Hansa Rostock on a free transfer.On 10 June 2022, Hüsing signed with Arminia Bielefeld.

SUMMARY: Oliver Hüsing (born 17 February 1993) is a German professional footballer who plays as a centre-back.
